VREAndroids.AndroidGeneDef.label: hemogenic
VREAndroids.AndroidGeneDef.description: An infiltrator-grade circulatory system: synthetic blood that behaves like the real thing, so the android bleeds red and passes for organic under anything short of a surgical examination. It is topped up with hemogen packs rather than neutroamine, and if its wounds bleed out it can die like an organic - though its subcore stays recoverable.

VREAndroids.AndroidGeneDef.label: bloodless
VREAndroids.AndroidGeneDef.description: This android runs completely dry, with no circulating fluid whatsoever. It never bleeds and its wounds reveal bare metal, but it gains no efficiency from a circulatory system and has no reservoir to refill.

VREAndroids.AndroidGeneDef.label: coagulation
VREAndroids.AndroidGeneDef.description: Emergency sealant routines clamp down on a breached fluid line within seconds. Wounds on this android bleed far more slowly. Has no effect on a bloodless frame, which has nothing to lose.
